goal: Add Cursor as a fourth Atelier harness that manages global specialized subagents without reading or modifying Cursor native configuration.

tasks.name: Define agent-only Cursor configuration
tasks.description: Add cursor to the harness source of truth and define an agent-only Cursor config section.

tests: Harness union includes cursor
Cursor section accepts only agent selections

tasks.name: Remove provisional native Cursor integration
tasks.description: Delete the provisional model fixture and remove Cursor native config path resolution. Cursor agents remain under the home-directory global location, but no Cursor native configuration path is resolved or used.

tests: Existing base-path behavior remains correct
No Cursor native config path resolver remains

tasks.name: Implement Cursor subagent adapter
tasks.description: Implement Cursor as an agent-only adapter. Generate global recon, oracle, and architect Markdown subagents under ~/.cursor/agents using the configured models. Keep native configuration untouched, report only generated agents, and remove only generated agents while preserving user-created agents.

tests: Default agent models are Composer 2.5, Opus 4.8 High, and GPT-5.6 Sol Medium
Focused picker includes Grok, Kimi, and GLM
Generated agents use Cursor Markdown frontmatter
Install, update, and remove never create or modify cli-config.json
Remove preserves user-created agents

tasks.name: Register Cursor and validate configuration
tasks.description: Register Cursor and extend registry and configuration coverage from three harnesses to four. Cursor's Atelier section contains only agents. Preserve old flat config detection.

tests: Registry lists claude, opencode, codex, and cursor
Agent-only Cursor config round-trips
Multi-harness configuration including Cursor validates
Old flat config detection remains correct
acceptance: bun test src/adapters/index.test.ts src/registry.test.ts src/utils/config.test.ts passes

tasks.name: Integrate Cursor command workflows
tasks.description: Extend generic command coverage and messages for Cursor. Init and update generate configured agents; remove deletes only generated agents and the Cursor Atelier section. Existing Cursor native configuration must remain untouched.

tests: atelier init --harness cursor --yes succeeds without a Cursor native config
Interactive Cursor init exposes focused agent-model choices
Update regenerates agents and persists changed selections
Remove preserves cli-config.json
CLI help and invalid-harness errors list cursor

tasks.name: Document Cursor support and run quality gates
tasks.description: Document Cursor support, global agent files, subagent defaults, and that Cursor's primary model is user-managed. Update package discovery metadata and run complete quality gates.

tests: Documentation reflects agent-only behavior
Built distribution contains Cursor adapter
